statement: In every magma, Equation 3002 (`x = ((y * (z * y)) * w) * x`) implies Equation 2281 (`x = (x * (y * (z * z))) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0072
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op z y)) w) x)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op x (op y (op z z))) x)
